x-enumeration-literals.name: Financial Analysts
x-enumeration-literals.description: They analyze financial data to identify trends, assess financial health, and provide insights into customer financial behavior.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Data Analysts
x-enumeration-literals.description: They gather, process, and analyze financial data from various sources to uncover patterns and insights.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Business Intelligence Analysts
x-enumeration-literals.description: They use data visualization and reporting tools to present financial insights in an understandable and actionable manner.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Risk Analysts
x-enumeration-literals.description: They assess financial risks associated with customer behavior and predict potential future risks.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Accountants
x-enumeration-literals.description: They manage and analyze financial records to ensure accuracy and compliance, providing insights into financial performance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Relationship Managers
x-enumeration-literals.description: They use financial insights to enhance customer relationships and tailor financial products and services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Financial Advisors
x-enumeration-literals.description: They provide personalized financial advice to customers based on their financial insights and needs.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Data Scientists
x-enumeration-literals.description: They develop models and algorithms to predict customer financial behavior and trends.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Product Managers
x-enumeration-literals.description: They use financial insights to develop and enhance financial products and services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance Officers
x-enumeration-literals.description: They ensure that financial insights and practices comply with regulatory requirements and standards.
